tags.note: No traffic signals noted on survey, March 11 2014
Restrictive cycle barrier. Protection from tram (tunnel ends right on tram rais).
Also has flashing light, probably conditional on times with heavy pedestrian movement (e.g., school starts/ends)
final traffic signals for tram crossing

tags.description:
Είσοδος προς Κηφισιά 
Entrance to Kifissia

tags.note: this is the only actual crossing in the whole area. all the other crossings are indeed underground.
you can indeed follow this sidewalk for a few meters, but it really goes nowhere.
you can indeed follow this pavement until this spot, but there's no where to go than back...
U-Turn from Poseidonos (towards Glyfada) to Poseidonos (towards Faliro) allowed. U-Turn from Poseidonos (towards Faliro) to Poseidonos (towards Glyfada) not allowed. Proper Restrictions in place.
Also has flashing light, probably conditional on times with heavy pedestrian movement (e.g., school starts/ends)
maxspeed sign on sign with yellow background (maxspeed has white background and red border)

Sidewalk. Removed bicycle access. Bicycles can reach the other bridge from the square.

tags.name: Εθνάρχου Μακαρίου
tags.note: This is a bridge. Ramps are not just visible but they are relatively steep (also visible curve check footway on ground level). Assumming Layer 1, even if this is not set. Therefore layer 1 has been set, which forces the highway above to be layer 2.
quickly fixed alignment, so that it doesn't pass through the new parking building. needs refinement

tags.name: Φαληρέως Δημητρίου
tags.note: From SEF road to Ethnarchou Makariou (towards Piraeus) and from Falireos to Ethnarchou Makariou (towards Moschato).
Moves parallel to the road. Starts at same level (sidewalk). Midway gets elevated.
this is the only actual crossing, marked with traffic signals

the only reason to map this instead of using a sidewalk= on the highway (preferred) is because it leads to an underground passage, a bus stop and a tram station and also because it absurdly ends on both sides leading to nowhere.
